channel.title: Ric 07 on Ric - An unknown artist
channel.description: Recent content in Ric 07 on Ric - An unknown artist

item.title: Sailing boat (Ric 07)
item.description: Short description: This is my third print of the Sailing boats (Ric 07 ). This print is interesting because it is not framed behind glass, but has been mounted on cardboard. The sheet has also been cropped to such an extent that not even the signature has been preserved. Notes: Found on a flea market in Hannover. Other entries for this work

item.title: Sailing boats (Ric 07)
item.description: Short description: Sailing boats Notes: Taken from auctionet.com . Slightly different colouring then other versions . Other entries for this work

item.title: Sailing boats (Ric 07)
item.description: Short description: Sailing boats Notes: Slightly different colouring then other versions . Other entries for this work

item.title: Ric 07
item.description: Short description: Two sailings boats Notes: Similar to Ric 02 Similar to Ric 17 Other entries for this work
